questionText: Complete a frase com a forma verbal correta: 'By the time the board convenes next Monday, the audit team _____ all the financial discrepancies.'
Qual é a preposição correta? 'The new policy is aimed _____ reducing employee turnover in the company.'
Escolha a forma correta do verbo modal: 'Employees _____ not disclose confidential information to third parties under any circumstances.'
Complete a frase corretamente: 'The HR manager suggested _____ a comprehensive onboarding program for new hires.'
Qual artigo é usado corretamente? 'She was promoted to _____ head of the department last quarter.'
Escolha a opção gramaticalmente correta: 'The project deadline has been pushed back, _____ gives the team more time to refine the deliverables.'
Complete com a voz passiva correta: 'The annual performance reviews _____ by the end of this month.'
Qual é a forma correta do gerúndio ou infinitivo? 'The CEO avoided _____ a direct answer about the upcoming layoffs during the press conference.'
Escolha a preposição adequada: 'The contract was drawn _____ by the legal team and reviewed by both parties.'
Complete a oração: 'Not only did she exceed the sales targets, _____ she also mentored three junior colleagues.'
Qual é a conjunção correta? 'The firm will proceed with the merger _____ the shareholders approve the terms at the extraordinary general meeting.'
Escolha a forma correta: 'The employees are looking forward _____ the new flexible working arrangements.'
Complete com o tempo verbal adequado: 'She _____ in the industry for over two decades before she retired as a managing director.'
Qual preposição completa corretamente? 'The board is responsible _____ setting the strategic direction of the organization.'
Escolha a alternativa gramaticalmente correta: 'He was made _____ for the department's failure to meet its quarterly targets.'
Complete a frase: 'The intern proved herself _____ capable of handling high-pressure situations independently.'
Qual é a opção correta de concordância verbal? 'Neither the director nor the supervisors _____ aware of the compliance breach until yesterday.'
Escolha a construção gramatical correta para o contexto formal: 'Had the management _____ the warning signs earlier, the financial crisis could have been averted.'
Complete com a estrutura correta de inversão enfática: '_____ did the executive team realize the magnitude of the problem until the auditors filed their report.'
Qual é a forma correta de subjuntivo em inglês formal? 'The committee recommended that the report _____ before the next board meeting.'
Complete a frase com a estrutura de particípio correta: '_____ the quarterly results, the CFO proposed a series of cost-cutting measures.'
Qual é a preposição correta neste contexto formal? 'The company's profitability is contingent _____ securing the government contract by Q3.'
Escolha a estrutura correta para exprimir condição hipotética no passado: 'The project _____ on schedule had the client not changed the specifications mid-way.'
Complete com a forma verbal correta após verbo de percepção: 'The supervisor noticed the new employee _____ with several sensitive files without proper authorization.'
Qual é a concordância verbal correta? 'The number of remote workers _____ increased significantly since the pandemic, according to the latest HR statistics.'
Escolha a estrutura nominal correta: 'The company was on the verge _____ when the new investors stepped in with emergency funding.'
Complete com a forma gramaticalmente precisa: 'The restructuring plan, _____ was presented to shareholders last week, involves closing three regional offices.'

Qual é a construção correta para indicar uma ação em andamento no passado quando outra ocorreu? 'She _____ the final clause of the contract when the other party's lawyer interrupted with a counter-proposal.'
Escolha a opção correta de uso do artigo definido ou indefinido: 'After years of experience, she finally landed _____ role she had always dreamed of in international trade law.'
Complete a frase com o conectivo correto de contraste: 'The company reported record profits; _____, the workforce morale has been at an all-time low.'
Qual é o uso correto do tempo perfeito contínuo? 'The legal team _____ over the acquisition details for three weeks and is still not ready to sign off.'
Escolha a estrutura correta de voz passiva com modal: 'All project proposals _____ to the steering committee for approval before work can commence.'
Qual é a forma nominal correta? 'His _____ of the situation was widely praised by colleagues and industry experts alike.'
Complete com a preposição de phrasal verb correta: 'The new regulations will do away _____ several outdated compliance requirements that have burdened SMEs for years.'
Escolha a estrutura correta de correlação: '_____ the executive team deliberate in private, _____ their decision-making tends to be more effective.'
Qual é a estrutura correta de inversão após advérbio negativo? 'Rarely _____ such a drastic measure in response to a single quarter of underperformance.'
Complete com a estrutura de subjuntivo ou condicional correta: 'It is imperative that the whistleblower's identity _____ under all circumstances.'
Escolha a construção de particípio absoluto correta: '_____, the negotiations resumed on more favorable terms for the union.'
Qual é a forma correta da estrutura condicional mista (mixed conditional)? 'If she _____ the terms of the non-compete clause, she would be free to consult for rival firms now.'
Complete com a estrutura de clivagem (cleft sentence) correta: 'It was the lack of transparency in the reporting process _____ ultimately led to the regulatory inquiry.'
Escolha a forma gramaticalmente correta da construção passiva causativa: 'The CFO _____ the balance sheets independently verified before presenting them to the board.'
Qual é a construção correta de gerúndio como sujeito com possessivo? 'The board objected to _____ the restructuring plan without prior consultation with the workforce.'
Complete com a estrutura de inversão após 'so...that' com ênfase: 'So pervasive _____ the culture of overwork that burnout rates have reached unprecedented levels.'
Qual é a preposição correta em contexto jurídico-profissional? 'The employee was found to be in breach _____ her fiduciary duty to the organization.'
Escolha a forma correta de reported speech com mudança de tempo verbal: 'The arbitrator declared that the initial settlement _____ far below what the claimant was entitled to.'
Complete com a estrutura correta de 'wish' para lamentar uma situação presente: 'Many senior employees wish the company _____ more emphasis on professional development and upskilling.'
Qual é a forma correta de particípio passado reduzido em oração adjetiva? 'The documents _____ in the due diligence process revealed several undisclosed liabilities.'
Escolha a estrutura correta de ênfase com 'only' em posição inicial: 'Only by fostering a psychologically safe environment _____ true innovation flourish within an organization.'
Qual é a forma verbal correta no contexto de aspecto perfeito passivo com modal epistêmico? 'Given the inconsistencies in the report, the data _____ without proper statistical controls.'
Complete com a conjunção de concessão mais formal e precisa: 'The proposal was approved, _____ several board members had expressed serious reservations about the projected ROI.'
Qual é a estrutura correta de gerúndio negativo em posição adverbial? '_____ all the available data, the analyst submitted an incomplete forecast to the steering committee.'
